title: FDs SkyHotbar Black & White
description: Resourcepak for a black and white hotbar GUI
body:
# Black & White hotbar for Hypixel Skyblock
_You´re playing it all day long, shouldn´t you really like, how does it look like?_

![Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd6fe85ea7273807972b3f89aa280d1a95eaf947.png)

## To change the experience level number color you need EBNCC
For the experience level I work with mod EBNCC (Experience Bar Number Color Change) from FifthTundraG.
Settings for the with this hotbar are:
  - Number - #ffffffff
  - Border - #ff000000
 
_You can also find this settings inside the resourcepack file_


----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
### This resourcepack is a part of FDs SkyBlock TWEAKS
Collection of resource packs containing small to medium modifications to the textures, that players can combine into their needs.
- I CAN MAKE YOU YOUR OWN BUNDLE OUT OF MY MULTIPLE TWEAKS IF YOU CONTACT ME
- I DO EXPAND MY TWEAKS ON YOUR REQUESTS

![FD Tweaks signature](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/131f420f32951fadb44ce0d4ea7a0aa3094e417a.png)

[![Coffee](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f8d2793b350171ff576fe23960a31b5f5cfb216.png)](https://buymeacoffee.com/2fd2)
